runTitle: Local QA - AI Engine Zod v4 Migration

environment.backend: Cloud Run AI Engine local source

coveredSurfaces: AI Engine zod runtime dependency alignment
AI Engine type-check, Vitest suites, and npm audit

expertAssessments.rationale: The migration was covered by an SDD failing-test baseline, targeted schema regressions, full AI Engine Vitest, type-check, and audit gates.
The change preserves structured schema contracts and avoids live-provider behavior changes; deterministic local tests are the right QA surface.
The dependency alignment removed AI Engine Zod duplication and confirmed production/full npm audit results at 0 vulnerabilities.

completedImprovements.title: Migrate AI Engine from Zod v3 to Zod v4
completedImprovements.evidence: AI Engine zod dependency updated to 4.4.3; type-check, targeted Vitest, full Vitest, and production/full npm audit passed.

notes: SDD failing-test baseline was committed first: 6293ea221 test(spec): zod v4 migration add failing tests before implementation.
cloud-run/ai-engine zod was migrated from 3.25.76 to 4.4.3.
vision-url-tool.ts now uses the Zod v4 top-level z.url() helper.
server metrics record schemas now use the Zod v4 z.record(key, value) signature.
orchestrator structured routing now parses the fallback object through routingSchema.parse before use.
Targeted Vitest passed: vision-url-tool, agent schemas, orchestrator object fallback, server metrics; 4 files / 42 tests.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check passed.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run test passed: 110 files / 1091 tests.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm audit --omit=dev passed with 0 vulnerabilities.
cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm audit passed with 0 vulnerabilities.
npm run docs:budget, npm run docs:ai-consistency, and git diff --check passed before QA recording.
No live AI, Vercel, Cloud Run production, or external provider call was executed for this deterministic local QA run.
